# Skopyr

Skopyr is a reverse marketplace for services in Abuja, Nigeria.

## What users can do
- Post service requests and compare provider bids
- Message providers and requesters directly
- Use Paystack-backed escrow for protected payments
- Run sponsored ads so provider services appear in premium homepage placement

## Focus services
- Generator repair
- Plumbing
- AC repair
- Cleaning
- Solar and inverter support

## Website
- https://www.skopyr.com
